headline: Risk-on intact; IP + ASB on deck — space sector wreckage deepens, U.S.-Iran deal lifts macro tone

actions.line: Half-size long; signal agrees, low-severity risk, research neutral — R/R ~2:1 on Iran-driven cost relief tailwind.

watch.line: -32.8%, 2.15× vol, MACD bearish — space sector rout persists; no floor visible yet.

-12.0%, 2.31× vol — unusual volume confirms distribution, not just sympathy.

changed: IP sizing cut from full to half vs prior briefing

caveats: WEEKEND scan — prices as of Friday close (2026-06-13); Monday open gaps likely given U.S.-Iran deal headlines developing over the weekend. Treat all levels as stale until RTH open.
Iran deal not yet signed — any breakdown over the weekend reverses the macro tailwind instantly; energy and industrial setups could gap adversely.
